genvidtech_youtubevideoplugin.name: YouTube Video Plugin
genvidtech_youtubevideoplugin.description: YouTube Video Plugin integration by Genvid Technologies

video-subtitles.name: Subtitles
video-subtitles.desc: The subtitles language for subtitles. "off" to turn them off.

enable-chrome.name: Enable Chrome
enable-chrome.desc: Show the YouTube player control bar (player built-in UI). Off by default; hosts typically provide their own UI.

loop.name: Loop
loop.desc: Loop the video when it reaches the end. Applies when the player is built (set before the video URL); not changed live.

start.name: Start time (seconds)
start.desc: Start playback at this offset in seconds. Applies at player construction only.

on-state-changed.description: Triggered when the video player state has changed.

on-error.description: Triggered when the video player encountered an error.

is-playing.description: Whether the video player is playing or not

is-paused.description: Whether the video player is paused or not

is-ended.description: Whether the video player is ended or not

is-muted.description: Whether the video player is muted or not

is-loading.description: Whether the video player is loading or not

is-ready.description: Whether the video player is ready or not

is-offline.description: Whether the video player is offline or not

has-subtitles.description: Whether any subtitle tracks are available (in-manifest or side-loaded).

has-subtitle-language.description: Whether a subtitle track with the given language is available (case-insensitive).

lang.name: Language
lang.desc: BCP-47 language code to look for (e.g. "en", "fr", "en-ext").

has-subtitle-label.description: Whether a subtitle track with the given label is available (case-insensitive).

label.name: Label
label.desc: Subtitle track label to look for (e.g. "English").

on-subtitles-available.description: Triggered when the subtitle track list becomes known or changes.

set-muted.display-text: Mute state of the video player is set to {0}

mute.name: mute
mute.desc: Mute state of the video player. True will mute the player.

set-playback-time.display-text: Sets the playback time of the video player to {0}
set-playback-time.description: Sets the playback time to be played.

playback-time.name: playbackTime
playback-time.desc: The playback time to be specified.

set-volume.display-text: Sets the video player volume level to {0}
set-volume.description: Sets the video player instance volume.

set-url.description: Set the Video Player URL. Loading a video clears the current subtitle selection and any side-loaded subtitle sources; use Set Subtitles / Add Subtitle Source afterwards.

set-subtitles.description: Set the subtitles for the video.

language.name: Language
language.desc: A language code for the subtitles, or "off" to turn them off.

set-enable-chrome.display-text: Set player built-in control bar (chrome) enabled to {0}
set-enable-chrome.description: Show or hide the YouTube player control bar. This is a live change and does not require a player rebuild.

enable.name: Enable
enable.desc: True to show the built-in control bar; false to hide it.

add-subtitle-source.description: Add an external subtitle track (by URL) to the player, injected alongside any in-manifest tracks. Call AFTER Load Video (loading a video clears side-loaded sources); then select it with Set Subtitles using its language.

url.name: URL
url.desc: URL of the external subtitle file (e.g. a .vtt file).

language.name: Language
language.desc: BCP-47 language code for the track (e.g. "en", "fr"). Use a tag distinct from the in-manifest tracks (e.g. "en-ext").

label.name: Label
label.desc: Human-readable label shown in the subtitle selector (e.g. "English").

add-project-subtitle-source.description: Add an external subtitle track from a project file. The file is resolved to a URL at runtime, then injected like Add Subtitle Source. Call AFTER Load Video; select it with Set Subtitles using its language.

file.name: Project file
file.desc: Name of the subtitle project file (e.g. "subtitles.vtt").

language.name: Language
language.desc: BCP-47 language code for the track (e.g. "en", "fr"). Use a tag distinct from the in-manifest tracks (e.g. "en-ext").

label.name: Label
label.desc: Human-readable label shown in the subtitle selector (e.g. "English").

resize.description: Re-sync the player dimensions to its container. The player is automatically resized via ResizeObserver; use this action when an immediate manual re-sync is needed.

state.description: The state of the video player.

get-last-error-category.description: The last error category.  Could be 'iframe' or 'youtube'.

get-last-error-message.description: The last error message.  Can depend on platform, etc.

get-current-playback-time.description: The current playback time of the video player.

get-current-volume.description: The current volume of the video player.

subtitles.description: The subtitles languages for the video. "off" if turned off.

get-enable-chrome.description: Whether the YouTube player control bar (player built-in UI) is enabled.

get-subtitle-count.description: The number of available subtitle tracks (in-manifest + side-loaded).

get-subtitle-language-at.description: The language code of the subtitle track at the given index.

index.name: Index
index.desc: Zero-based index into the subtitle track list (0 to GetSubtitleCount-1).

get-subtitle-label-at.description: The human-readable label of the subtitle track at the given index.

index.name: Index
index.desc: Zero-based index into the subtitle track list (0 to GetSubtitleCount-1).
